title: Company
description: Manage your company settings, team, and visual identity.

business.title: Business
business.description: Manage your team details and team members.

logo.title: Logo
logo.description: Add or update your company logo

logoUploader.hint: SVG, PNG or JPG. Up to 2MB.

general.title: General
general.description: Update your team name and settings

deleteTeam.title: Delete team
deleteTeam.warningDescription: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteTeam.modalDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the team "{name}".

members.title: Team members
members.description: Manage who belongs to this team
members.pendingInvitationsDescription: Invitations that haven't been accepted yet

addMemberModal.title: Add a team member
addMemberModal.description: Create an account and add them to this team right away.
addMemberModal.name: Name

inviteMemberModal.title: Invite a team member
inviteMemberModal.description: Send an invitation to join this team.

removeMemberModal.title: Remove team member
removeMemberModal.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this team?

cancelInvitationModal.title: Cancel invitation
cancelInvitationModal.description: Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation for {email}?

memberEdit.description: Manage this member's account, profile, access and assignments

account.title: Account
account.description: Update this member's name and login email address
account.name: Name

profile.pictureDescription: Public photo shown to customers when they book
profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Public information shown to customers when they book
profile.name: Name
profile.publicEmailHint: This can differ from the login email.

access.title: Access Control
access.description: The role that determines what this member can do
access.ownerNotice: This member is the team owner.
access.ownerCannotChange: The owner's role cannot be changed here.

locations.title: Locations
locations.empty: No locations yet. Add one under Company → Locations.

services.title: Services
services.empty: No services yet. Add one under Company → Services.

services.title: Services
services.description: Manage the services and categories your company offers.
services.empty: No services yet — add your first one.
services.noServicesInCategory: No services in this category yet.

categoryDialog.addDescription: Group your services under a new category.
categoryDialog.editDescription: Update the name for this category.
categoryDialog.name: Name

deleteCategoryModal.title: Delete category
deleteCategoryModal.confirmWithServices: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? Its {count} service(s) will be kept and moved to Uncategorized.
deleteCategoryModal.confirmNoServices: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

deleteServiceModal.title: Delete service
deleteServiceModal.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.addDescription: Add a new service for your company.
form.editDescription: Update the details for this service.
form.activeHint: Inactive services are hidden from use.
form.locationsHint: Branches where this service is offered.
form.specialistsHint: Team members who provide this service.
form.categoryHint: Optional — group related services together to keep your list organised.

wizard.title: Add service
wizard.description: Set up a new service step by step.

delivery.heading: How is this service delivered?
delivery.subheading: This decides how customers attend their appointment. You can change it later.
delivery.onsiteDescription: Customers come to one of your locations, such as a salon, clinic or office.
delivery.onlineDescription: You meet customers over a video call — no physical location needed.

online.heading: How should meeting links be handled?
online.subheading: Every online appointment needs a meeting link for the customer to join.
online.automaticDescription: A meeting link is generated automatically when a booking is made.
online.manualDescription: You send the meeting link to the customer yourself before the meeting starts.
online.connectedAs: Google is connected as {email} — meeting links will be created automatically.
online.manualNote: No link will be generated automatically. You are responsible for sending the meeting link to the customer before each appointment.
online.providersHeading: Set up providers for automatic meeting generation
online.providersDescription: Links are created from the assigned specialist’s account. You can set this up later — the service saves either way, but no links are generated until a provider is connected.

locations.heading: Where is this service offered?
locations.subheading: Onsite services must be available in at least one of your locations.
locations.empty: You don't have any locations yet. Add your first one to continue.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Set your availability for the next 7 days.
